[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011010110 6
1 1100001000 3
2 0110011001 5
3 1100011101 6
4 1101101111 8
5 0001101000 3
6 1111101101 8
7 1110101110 7

01 0000010000 1
12 1100000111 5
23 0000000000 a
34 0001000001 2
45 0100101000 3
56 0011010110 5
67 1000000000 1
70 0010000000 1

02 1100010101 5
13 0000000010 1
24 0001000000 1
35 0100101001 4
46 0010100110 4
57 1001000110 4
60 0000000000 a
71 0010010000 2

03 0000010000 1
14 0001000001 2
25 0000101000 2
36 0011100101 5
47 1000100110 4
50 0011000010 3
61 0000000000 a
72 0110010001 4

04 0000010001 2
15 0100101001 4
26 0001100000 2
37 1001100100 4
40 0010100010 3
51 0010010000 2
62 1100000000 2
73 0000010000 1

05 0100001001 3
16 0001100111 5
27 0001100000 2
30 0011100000 3
41 0010000000 1
52 1010010110 5
63 0000000000 a
74 0000010001 2

06 0000010101 3

20 0001100000 2

75 0100001001 3

07 1000000100 2
10 0001100010 3
21 0000000000 a
32 1110000101 5

54 0001010000 2
